title: Better Motion Blur
description: A mod that makes motion blur better (:
body:
🎮 Better Motion Blur
Elevate your visuals with fully customizable cinematic motion effects.

Better Motion Blur is a visual enhancement mod that introduces a wide range of advanced settings to fully customize motion blur effects. With precise control over intensity, direction, smoothing, and layering, it allows for everything from subtle cinematic motion to dramatic high-speed effects.

✨ Why it matters
🌀 Adds smooth, cinematic motion to gameplay
🎥 Makes recordings and clips look more professional
⚡ Enhances fast movement and PvP fights
🎯 Gives full control over how motion blur looks and feels

🚀 How it works
The mod applies adjustable motion blur effects in real time, blending frames based on movement. Instead of fixed or basic blur, it lets you fine-tune how motion is processed—resulting in smoother transitions, cleaner visuals, and a more polished overall experience.

🎯 Perfect for
PvP players
Minecraft content creators
SMP and montage editors
Players who want cinematic visuals

💡 Customize your motion. Refine your visuals. Upgrade your gameplay.
